subject: [DCAEGEN2] Update CM version and readiness probe
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Update CM version and readiness probe

CM container startup scripts log to stdout for
easier debugging.
CM container readiness probe timeout extended
to support environments where the readiness
check takes longer to run.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2457
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2465
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflos@sonoris.net>
Change-Id: Id25ec4cd8932818e2b78c02f7fe041f30cefc962

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Patch Set 1:

Note the gating has been executed on Azure. So we will see the impact of the timeout extension in next daily but we cannot conclude yet as DCAE installation was fine on Azure without the timeout adjustment

> 
> Note the gating has been executed on Azure. So we will see the impact of the timeout extension in next daily but we cannot conclude yet as DCAE installation was fine on Azure without the timeout adjustment

Agreed; could be other problems still attributing to integration failures. The new patch includes updates to capture CM container log to stdout - so should help in debugging. 

Morgan - Can you trigger the integration daily manually to check with new patch?

it is in progress..results in some minutes hopefully
